title: 3D Bamboo Shoots
body:
Makes bamboo shoots (stage 0) 3D. It currently has 4 variants: big, medium, double and small. Highly recommended with **Bushy Bamboo**.
#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#
Also available on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/3d-bamboo-saplings/
